title: Reluctant quantifiers in regular expressions should be followed by an expression that can't match the empty string
description: This rule checks if a reluctant quantifier in a regular expression is followed by an expression that can match the empty string.
message: Reluctant quantifier followed by an expression that can match the empty string
impact: Potential data loss or incorrect matching
recommendation: Modify the regular expression to avoid this issue
why_is_this_an_issue: A reluctant quantifier followed by an expression that can match the empty string may cause incorrect matching or data loss.
how_to_fix: Modify the regular expression to include an expression that can't match the empty string after the reluctant quantifier.

checks.message: Reluctant quantifier followed by an expression that can match the empty string

metadata.title: Reluctant quantifiers in regular expressions should be followed by an expression that can't match the empty string
